name: Web Page Harvester
tagline: Watches simple web pages for changes and turns them into BFrost items.
description:
A producer worker that fetches configured web pages on a schedule and publishes changed pages as `web.page` items on the BFrost Item Bus.

It is intentionally lightweight: no browser automation, no credentials, and no JavaScript execution. Use it for changelogs, documentation pages, status pages, product updates, and public pages where a text excerpt is enough.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with scheduled page fetching, web.page publishing, change detection, dashboard view, and low-code README.
